title: HeadDrops
description: This is a small simple plugin that drops players heads upon death.
body:
## HeadDrops

**HeadDrops** adds a feature where if you kill a player, their head will drop.

---

## Setup Instructions

**1. Download the Plugin**  
Grab the latest version from the plugin page.

**2. Install**  
Place the `.jar` file into your server’s `/plugins` folder.

**3. Restart Your Server**  
You can use `/reload`, but a full restart is recommended for the best experience.

---

## Support
